description: Determines how many creatures appear and provides a Potency modifier. Apply the negative modifier when creatures appear in groups, or the positive modifier to scale a solo creature to match a larger group.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines how many creatures appear and provides a Potency modifier. Apply the negative modifier when creatures appear in groups, or the positive modifier to scale a solo creature to match a larger group.

entries.description: Potency Modifier: 0. A single creature with no modifier to Potency rolls.

descriptionTranslations.en: Potency Modifier: 0. A single creature with no modifier to Potency rolls.

entries.description: Potency Modifier: -2/+2. Two creatures appear. Apply -2 to Potency when in a group, or +2 to scale a solo creature.

descriptionTranslations.en: Potency Modifier: -2/+2. Two creatures appear. Apply -2 to Potency when in a group, or +2 to scale a solo creature.

entries.description: Potency Modifier: -2/+2. Three creatures appear. Apply -2 to Potency when in a group, or +2 to scale a solo creature.

descriptionTranslations.en: Potency Modifier: -2/+2. Three creatures appear. Apply -2 to Potency when in a group, or +2 to scale a solo creature.

entries.description: Potency Modifier: -4/+4. Four creatures appear. Apply -4 to Potency when in a group, or +4 to scale a solo creature.

descriptionTranslations.en: Potency Modifier: -4/+4. Four creatures appear. Apply -4 to Potency when in a group, or +4 to scale a solo creature.

entries.description: Potency Modifier: -4/+4. Five creatures appear. Apply -4 to Potency when in a group, or +4 to scale a solo creature.

descriptionTranslations.en: Potency Modifier: -4/+4. Five creatures appear. Apply -4 to Potency when in a group, or +4 to scale a solo creature.

entries.description: Potency Modifier: -5/+5. Six or more creatures appear. Apply -5 to Potency when in a group, or +5 to scale a solo creature.

descriptionTranslations.en: Potency Modifier: -5/+5. Six or more creatures appear. Apply -5 to Potency when in a group, or +5 to scale a solo creature.
